title: Smoky Portuguese Tart
description: A rich and savory tart filled with smoky cheese and Portuguese meat. Perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Transfer pastry to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a large skillet, cook sliced sausage over medium-high heat until browned.
Transfer cooked sausage to a bowl and set aside.
Sprinkle crumbled cheese over the bottom of the pastry crust.
Arrange cooked sausage slices on top of cheese.
Brush edges of pastry with beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until pastry is golden brown and cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
